fields.name: noticeId
fields.description: Unique identifier for this transaction hold notice

fields.name: timestamp
fields.description: Date and time when the hold notice was generated

fields.name: department
fields.description: Originating department that issued the hold notice

fields.name: recipientDepartment
fields.description: Destination department receiving the hold notice

fields.name: noticeType
fields.description: Classification of the notice indicating a transaction hold action

fields.name: severity
fields.description: Risk severity level of the hold notice

fields.name: accountNumber
fields.description: IBAN of the account subject to the transaction hold

fields.name: customerId
fields.description: Unique identifier for the customer associated with the held account

fields.name: customerName
fields.description: Full name of the customer associated with the held account

fields.name: holdReason
fields.description: Business rationale for placing the transaction hold, citing detected risk factors

fields.name: holdEffectiveDate
fields.description: Date and time when the transaction hold became effective

fields.name: estimatedHoldDuration
fields.description: Expected duration of the hold expressed in business days or time period

fields.name: transactionsAffected
fields.description: List of transactions placed on hold by this notice

children.name: transactionId
children.description: Unique identifier for the held transaction

children.name: amount
children.description: Transaction amount in the specified currency

children.name: currency
children.description: ISO 4217 currency code of the transaction

children.name: destinationCountry
children.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code of the transaction destination

children.name: status
children.description: Current status of the transaction indicating it is held

fields.name: riskScore
fields.description: Quantified risk assessment score on a scale, typically 0–10, indicating severity of detected risk

fields.name: riskFlags
fields.description: List of specific risk indicators or compliance flags that triggered the hold

fields.name: requiredActions
fields.description: List of mandatory actions the Accounts department must perform to resolve the hold

fields.name: escalationLevel
fields.description: Numeric escalation tier indicating the severity and approval authority required

fields.name: approvalRequired
fields.description: Flag indicating whether senior management approval is required to release the hold

fields.name: approverRole
fields.description: Job title or role of the person authorized to approve release of the hold

fields.name: notes
fields.description: Additional contextual information or observations relevant to the hold decision

fields.name: expiryDate
fields.description: Date and time after which the hold notice expires and transactions may proceed if not explicitly released

fields.name: issuedBy
fields.description: System or process identifier that generated and issued the hold notice

fields.name: priority
fields.description: Priority level for handling the hold notice
